shards.name: New Renaissance
shards.description: Classic username/password shard profile. The launcher resolves the shard host and saves account metadata for the client login flow.

shards.name: UO New Dawn
shards.description: Discord OAuth shard. The launcher opens the browser for approval, listens for the callback JWT, and saves the selected login server plus JWT metadata.

shards.name: Tides of Power
shards.description: Account/password shard profile. The launcher captures credentials and optional client asset path, while the client shard behavior remains a placeholder for manual implementation.
